title: festuca dalmatica subsp. panciciana
intro: Festuca dalmatica subsp. panciciana, also known as Dalmatian fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Festuca dalmatica subsp. panciciana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and essential oils that can be used to treat various health conditions.
